description: Specifications : Brand: EPOSBITS Paper Type: Thermal ECO Thermal: Yes Color: White Dust Free: Yes Total Boxes: 1 Rolls per Box: 20 Total Rolls: 20 Coating Level: High providing clear prints (Dependent on settings and quality and print speed) Data Printing Coating: Black Compatibility: Chip & Pin Termianls, Calculators, PDQ,EFT Termianls (Lead Free) Requiring no ink Durability: High Temperature Resistance Core Present: Yes Core Material: Plastic Core Size: Mini Roll End Waring: Yes - Red line indication Resistance: Crease free when feeding through old mechanical printers Minimum Temperature: 44°F/6.66°C with 14% relative humidity Maximum Temperature: 78°F/25.56°C with 82% relative humidity Packaging: Rolls wrapped in Polythene and in treated cardboard carton to provide longer shelf life Cutter Operation: Cuts smoothly without causing damage to blade in machinery Curl: Curl free when feed out Moisture Content: Low
